CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-15-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Philip Keith, Esq. for Plaintiff: Fuad Ateyeh, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: John O'Rourke and Jean O'Rourke as follows:
Principal $100,000.00
Prejudgment Interest $13,370.00
Attorney's Fees $11,300.00
Costs $685.00, for a total of $125,355.00
Judgment signed in open court.
